prompt.name: Weather Card
prompt.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
prompt.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

generation.sourceCode:
import React from 'react';
import { Card, Stack, Row, Text, Box } from '@ggui-ai/design/primitives';

interface ForecastDay {
  day: string;
  condition: string;
  icon?: string;
  high: string;
  low: string;
}

interface Props {
  location?: string;
  temperature?: string;
  unit?: string;
  condition?: string;
  conditionIcon?: string;
  humidity?: string;
  windSpeed?: string;
  windLabel?: string;
  humidityLabel?: string;
  forecast?: ForecastDay[];
  forecastLabel?: string;
}

const conditionEmojiMap: Record<string, string> = {
  sunny: '☀️',
  clear: '☀️',
  partlycloudy: '⛅',
  partly_cloudy: '⛅',
  cloudy: '☁️',
  overcast: '☁️',
  rainy: '🌧️',
  rain: '🌧️',
  drizzle: '🌦️',
  storm: '⛈️',
  thunderstorm: '⛈️',
  snowy: '❄️',
  snow: '❄️',
  windy: '💨',
  foggy: '🌫️',
  mist: '🌫️',
};

function getConditionIcon(condition?: string, explicitIcon?: string) {
  if (explicitIcon) return explicitIcon;
  if (!condition) return '🌤️';
  const normalized = condition.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '').replace(/-/g, '_');
  return conditionEmojiMap[normalized] || '🌤️';
}

export default function GeneratedComponent({
  location = 'Current Weather',
  temperature = '72',
  unit = '°F',
  condition = 'Sunny',
  conditionIcon,
  humidity = '45%',
  windSpeed = '12 mph',
  windLabel = 'Wind',
  humidityLabel = 'Humidity',
  forecast = [],
  forecastLabel = '5-Day Forecast',
}: Props) {
  return (
    <Card padding={24} shadow="md" border>
      <Stack gap={20}>
        <Row justify="between" align="start">
          <Stack gap={8}>
            <Text
              variant="caption"
              color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-500, #6b7280)"
              weight="medium"
            >
              {location}
            </Text>
            <Text
              variant="h1"
              color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-900, #111827)"
              weight="bold"
            >
              {temperature}{unit}
            </Text>
            <Row gap={8} align="center">
              <Text
                variant="h3"
                color="var(--ggui-color-primary-600, #0284c7)"
              >
                {getConditionIcon(condition, conditionIcon)}
              </Text>
              <Text
                variant="body"
                color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-700, #374151)"
                weight="medium"
              >
                {condition}
              </Text>
            </Row>
          </Stack>

          <Box
            padding="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
            background="var(--ggui-color-primary-50, #f0f9ff)"
            borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-xl, 16px)"
          >
            <Text
              variant="h2"
              color="var(--ggui-color-primary-700, #0369a1)"
              align="center"
            >
              {getConditionIcon(condition, conditionIcon)}
            </Text>
          </Box>
        </Row>

        <Row gap={12} wrap>
          <Box
            padding="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
            background="var(--ggui-color-neutral-100, #f3f4f6)"
            borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-lg, 12px)"
          >
            <Stack gap={4}>
              <Text
                variant="caption"
                color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-500, #6b7280)"
                weight="medium"
              >
                {humidityLabel}
              </Text>
              <Text
                variant="h3"
                color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-900, #111827)"
                weight="semibold"
              >
                {humidity}
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Box>

          <Box
            padding="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
            background="var(--ggui-color-neutral-100, #f3f4f6)"
            borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-lg, 12px)"
          >
            <Stack gap={4}>
              <Text
                variant="caption"
                color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-500, #6b7280)"
                weight="medium"
              >
                {windLabel}
              </Text>
              <Text
                variant="h3"
                color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-900, #111827)"
                weight="semibold"
              >
                {windSpeed}
              </Text>
            </Stack>
          </Box>
        </Row>

        <Box
          padding="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
          background="var(--ggui-color-primary-50, #f0f9ff)"
          borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-xl, 16px)"
        >
          <Stack gap={12}>
            <Text
              variant="label"
              color="var(--ggui-color-primary-700, #0369a1)"
              weight="semibold"
            >
              {forecastLabel}
            </Text>

            <Row gap={8} wrap>
              {forecast.map((day, index) => (
                <Box
                  key={day.day + '-' + index}
                  padding="var(--ggui-spacing-4, 16px)"
                  background="var(--ggui-color-neutral-50, #f9fafb)"
                  borderRadius="var(--ggui-shape-radius-lg, 12px)"
                >
                  <Stack gap={6} align="center">
                    <Text
                      variant="caption"
                      color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-500, #6b7280)"
                      weight="medium"
                      align="center"
                    >
                      {day.day}
                    </Text>
                    <Text
                      variant="h3"
                      color="var(--ggui-color-primary-600, #0284c7)"
                      align="center"
                    >
                      {getConditionIcon(day.condition, day.icon)}
                    </Text>
                    <Text
                      variant="body"
                      color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-900, #111827)"
                      weight="semibold"
                      align="center"
                    >
                      {day.high}
                    </Text>
                    <Text
                      variant="caption"
                      color="var(--ggui-color-neutral-500, #6b7280)"
                      align="center"
                    >
                      {day.low}
                    </Text>
                  </Stack>
                </Box>
              ))}
            </Row>
          </Stack>
        </Box>
      </Stack>
    </Card>
  );
}

prompt.name: Weather Card
prompt.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
prompt.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.
